历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were 8314 → 13628 → 17981 → 20051 → 25381, showing a continuous and significant backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of approximately 17,067 places in the past 4 years; the 2025 baseline is about 25,381, which is about 5,330 places further back from 2024, with a notably accelerated backward speed; the provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 12 in 2021, 12 in 2022, 13 in 2023, 15 in 2024, and 11 in 2025; the 2026 plan is only 5, a decrease of 6 from 2025's 11, a substantial reduction of about 54.5%, which significantly alleviates competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project and Double First-Class university; the Soft Science Chinese University Ranking has steadily risen from 93rd in 2021 to 81st in 2026, reflecting the university's enhanced comprehensive strength; the 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, with no major negative public opinion; Douyin popularity ranking is 49th (relatively hot), with above-average short video exposure; no historical abnormal application records for Shanghai International Studies University, indicating no signs of application gaps; Foreign Language and Literature is an A+ discipline (top in the country), which does not directly correspond to the Physics Category enrollment majors such as Management Science and Engineering, Business Administration, etc., but the university's overall language brand effect still holds appeal.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Management Science and Engineering, and Business Administration have a divided and wait-and-see social popularity, with no significant warming trend; in 2026, Guangdong Province has 456,000 Physics Category examinees, an increase of about 16,000 (+3.6%) from 440,208 in 2025, slightly intensifying competition; Shanghai International Studies University is located in Shanghai, which has strong regional appeal to Guangdong examinees; in 2021, the university enrolled 618 students nationwide, with 19 from Guangdong (3.07%), and the number of Guangdong enrollees has generally increased in recent years.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous and significant backward trend in historical rankings, the slight increase in Physics Category examinees in 2026 (+3.6%), and the significant alleviating effect of the substantial enrollment reduction (-54.5%), it is expected that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will significantly move forward from the 2025 baseline of 25,381; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 17,023, with a range of 16,523 to 17,523.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 16,523 to 17,523, Physics Category in 2026 has only 3 enrollment majors (total 5 students), so it is recommended to prioritize Management Science and Engineering and Business Administration; if the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<16,523), you can aim for Management Science and Engineering; if the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>17,523), it is recommended to use International Economics and Trade (Japanese) as a safety option.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were 1376 → 1689 → 2546 → 2792 → 3037, showing a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 1661 places in the past 4 years; the 2025 baseline is approximately 3037, a further backward shift of about 245 places compared to 2024, with a slight slowdown in the rate of backward shift; the provincial History Category enrollment plan was 7 in 2021, 5 in 2022, 14 in 2023, 7 in 2024, and 14 in 2025, with significant fluctuations; the 2026 plan is 13, a decrease of 1 from 2025's 14, a slight reduction of about 7.1%, which slightly alleviates competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; its ranking in the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings has steadily risen from 93rd in 2021 to 81st in 2026, reflecting an enhancement in overall strength; the 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, mainly involving management incidents such as air conditioning fee disputes, with no significant negative public opinion; Douyin popularity ranking is 49th (relatively hot), with medium-to-high short video exposure; there was a negative incident related to teacher ethics in 2022, but no major negative signals in recent years; Foreign Language and Literature is an A+ discipline (top in the country), highly corresponding to the university's enrollment majors such as English, Translation, French, and Spanish, strongly attracting language-oriented students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The overall social popularity of foreign language majors is stable, with no obvious signs of heating up or cooling down; in 2026, there are 326,200 History Category examinees in Guangdong Province, an increase of about 34,000 (+11.6%) compared to 292,200 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition; Shanghai International Studies University is located in Shanghai, which has a strong regional appeal to Guangdong examinees; in 2021, the university enrolled 618 students nationwide, with 19 from Guangdong (accounting for 3.07%), which is below average, but the number of enrollments from Guangdong has generally been on the rise in recent years.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the significant increase in History Category examinees in 2026 (+11.6%) leading to intensified competition, the enhanced attractiveness due to the university's rising rankings, and the mitigating effect of a slight reduction in enrollment plan (-7.1%), it is expected that the minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 will slightly move forward from the 2025 baseline of 3037; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 2877, with a range of 2377–3377.
